notes: Official Dance Theatre of Harlem Saturday Youth Drop-In and Who We Are pages (2026). Hero image is the DTH School JPEG used on the Saturday program page (WordPress media), downloaded and uploaded via POST /api/ingest/upload. Registration link taken from the Saturday program page HTML.
missingOrUncertain: ClassScout age bands are approximate: the program invites ages 8–17 overall; ballet sections are split 8–11 and 12–17 on the official page, while Afro Pop and Hip-Hop are listed as 12+.

The Afro Pop class description on the official page includes wording about “adults of all levels” in the same paragraph as the youth schedule context — treat audience as the published youth drop-in series and confirm with DTH before assuming age policy for that section.
Season dates Oct 4, 2025–May 9, 2026 appear on the Saturday page; future seasons may shift — confirm on dancetheatreofharlem.org before planning.
rating / reviewCount: not on official pages; 0 / 0.

document.name: Dance Theatre of Harlem School — Saturday Youth Drop-In Classes
document.shortDescription: Saturday drop-in youth dance at the Everett Center: beginner ballet (ages 8–11 and 12–17 tracks), Afro Pop 12+, and Hip-Hop 12+; $10 per class with online registration.
document.longDescription:
Dance Theatre of Harlem’s Saturday Youth Drop-In Classes run Saturdays from October 4, 2025 through May 9, 2026, and are open to youth ages 8–17 for the overall series, with no full-year school enrollment required to participate in these drop-ins per the official program page.

Published class blocks: Ballet (ages 8–11) 12:30–1:30 p.m. with Rachel Afi Sekyi; Ballet (ages 12–17) 12:30–1:30 p.m. with Erika Mosley; Afro Pop (12 years old+) 11:30 a.m.–12:30 p.m. with Negesti McIntosh; Hip-Hop (12 years old+) 1:30–2:30 p.m. with Aicha Konate. The page lists pricing as $10 for a single class and links to online registration via GoStudio Pro (account_id=31053 on the official “Register Here” link).

Venue and organization contact from the Who We Are page: Dance Theatre of Harlem at the Everett Center for the Performing Arts, 466 West 152nd Street, New York, NY 10031-1814; Tel 212.690.2800. School questions are directed to school-info@dancetheatreofharlem.org on the same site; general inquiries reference info@dancetheatreofharlem.org.

The listing image reproduces the official DTH School photograph used on the Saturday program page, re-hosted on ImgBB to meet ClassScout image policy.

Sources: https://dancetheatreofharlem.org/saturdayyouthdanceprogram/ https://dancetheatreofharlem.org/who-we-are/
document.announcementDescription: Official Saturday Youth page lists $10 per single class and online registration via the linked GoStudio Pro portal.
